title: aster scaber f. minor
intro: Aster scaber f. minor, also known as Small White Thistle or Lesser Aster, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce swelling, and alleviate pain. The plant is also valued for its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system and protect against infections. Aster scaber f. minor can be prepared into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to support respiratory health, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
